title: Nuclear watchdog: Natanz enrichment site in Iran damaged
author: Ashleigh Fields
fullText: The International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) on Tuesday said it can confirm that Iran’s Natanz enrichment site did sustain damage from U.S. and Israeli strikes.  The United Nations’ nuclear watchdog said the entrance to the building was recently damaged.  “No radiological consequence expected and no additional impact detected at FEP [Fuel Enrichment Plant] itself, which…
summary: The International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) on Tuesday said it can confirm that Iran’s Natanz enrichment site did sustain damage from U.S. and Israeli strikes.  The United Nations’ nuclear watchdog said the entrance to the building was recently damaged.  “No radiological consequence expected and no additional impact detected at FEP [Fuel Enrichment Plant] itself, which…
